Author: jgh

New Revision: 339397
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/339397

Log:
  - return to pool at request of maintainer
  
  Thanks for your past work!
  
  PR:		185643
  Submitted by:	maintainer, kutulu@kutulu.org

Modified:
  head/textproc/docbook-420/Makefile

Modified: head/textproc/docbook-420/Makefile

--- head/textproc/docbook-420/Makefile	Sat Jan 11 00:52:02 2014	(r339396)
+++ head/textproc/docbook-420/Makefile	Sat Jan 11 02:47:29 2014	(r339397)
@@ -7,7 +7,7 @@ CATEGORIES=	textproc
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.docbook.org/sgml/4.2/
 PKGNAMESUFFIX=	-420
 
-MAINTAINER=	kutulu@kutulu.org
+MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	V4.2 of the DocBook DTD, designed for technical documentation
 
 EXTRACT_DEPENDS=${UNZIP_CMD}:${PORTSDIR}/archivers/unzip
